name: The Dalmore 12 Year Old
subtitle: Single Malt Scotch Whisky · Highland, Scotland · 40% ABV
description: The gateway into the Dalmore signature style. Matured in American white oak ex-bourbon barrels before a finishing period in Matusalem oloroso sherry casks from González Byass — the house's characteristic dark fruit, chocolate, and citrus character at an accessible age point.
aroma: Dark chocolate, orange marmalade, raisin, and warm spice with a rich sherry sweetness
flavor: Full and warming, with dark fruit, toffee, orange peel, and a rich chocolate-sherry character
finish: Long and smooth, with lingering dark fruit and warming spice
imageAlt: The Dalmore 12 Year Old Single Malt Scotch Whisky
